        "\n",
        "## 9.2 `requirements.txt`\n",
        "\n",
        "Create this file in your repository root. It tells Streamlit Cloud which Python packages to install:\n",
        "\n",
        "```\n",
        "streamlit==1.35.0\n",
        "pandas==2.2.2\n",
        "numpy==1.26.4\n",
        "scikit-learn==1.5.0\n",
        "joblib==1.4.2\n",
        "```\n",
        "\n",
        "> ⚠️ **Version matching is critical.** The `scikit-learn` version here must match the version used when the model was trained and saved. A mismatch causes a `ValueError` on load. Check your training version in Colab with: `import sklearn; print(sklearn.__version__)`\n",
        "\n",
        "---\n",
        "\n",
        "## 9.3 `README.md`\n",
        "\n",
        "A well-written README determines whether someone reading your GitHub profile clicks through to your project. Use this template:\n",
        "\n",
        "```markdown\n",
        "# 🚚 SwiftChain Delivery Delay Prediction\n",
        "\n",
        "**Live App:** [your-app-url.streamlit.app](https://your-app-url.streamlit.app)\n",
        "\n",
        "## Project Summary\n",
        "A multiclass classification model that predicts whether a logistics order\n",
        "will arrive **Late**, **On-Time**, or **Early** — based on order and\n",
        "shipping characteristics available at dispatch time.\n",
        "\n",
        "Built for SwiftChain Analytics, a global logistics intelligence firm\n",
        "operating across 5 markets (Europe, LATAM, USCA, Pacific Asia, Africa).\n",
        "\n",
        "## Key Results\n",
        "| Metric | Value |\n",
        "|--------|-------|\n",
        "| Best Model | Gradient Boosting Classifier (Tuned) |\n",
        "| Test Accuracy | 62.0% |\n",
        "| Weighted F1 | 57.9% |\n",
        "| CV F1 (5-fold) | 0.5768 ± 0.0091 |\n",
        "| Top Feature | shipping_mode_Standard Class (67.2% importance) |\n",
        "\n",
        "## Key Finding\n",
        "Standard Class shipping mode accounts for **67.2% of total model\n",
        "importance** and carries a **38.1% late-delivery rate** — nearly 2× the\n",
        "global average of 22.8%. Shifting 10% of Standard Class orders to Second\n",
        "Class would prevent approximately 347 late deliveries per period.\n",
        "\n",
        "## Tech Stack\n",
        "Python · Pandas · Scikit-learn · Matplotlib · Seaborn · Streamlit · Joblib\n",
        "\n",
        "## Repository Structure\n",
        "| File | Description |\n",
        "|------|-------------|\n",
        "| `SwiftChain_Delivery_Delay_Prediction.ipynb` | Full analysis notebook |\n",
        "| `app.py` | Streamlit web application |\n",
        "| `swiftchain_delay_predictor.pkl` | Trained model |\n",
        "| `swiftchain_scaler.pkl` | Fitted StandardScaler |\n",
        "| `requirements.txt` | Python dependencies |\n",
        "\n",
        "## Author\n",
        "**Adewale Samson Adeagbo**  \n",
        "[LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/adewalesamsonadeagbo) ·\n",
        "[GitHub](https://github.com/cssadewale) ·\n",
        "buildingmyictcareer@gmail.com\n",
        "```\n",
        "\n",
        "---\n",
        "\n",
        "## 9.4 `app.py` — Streamlit Application\n",
        "\n",
        "Copy the complete code below into a file named `app.py`:\n",
        "\n",
        "```python\n",
        "import streamlit as st\n",
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "import joblib\n",
        "\n",
        "# ── Page configuration ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n",
        "st.set_page_config(\n",
        "    page_title=\"SwiftChain Delivery Predictor\",\n",
        "    page_icon=\"🚚\",\n",
        "    layout=\"centered\"\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "# ── Load model and scaler ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n",
        "@st.cache_resource\n",
        "def load_artifacts():\n",
        "    model  = joblib.load(\"swiftchain_delay_predictor.pkl\")\n",
        "    scaler = joblib.load(\"swiftchain_scaler.pkl\")\n",
        "    return model, scaler\n",
        "\n",
        "model, scaler = load_artifacts()\n",
        "\n",
        "# ── Header ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n",
        "st.title(\"🚚 SwiftChain Delivery Delay Predictor\")\n",
        "st.markdown(\n",
        "    \"Predict whether a logistics order will arrive **Late**, **On-Time**, \"\n",
        "    \"or **Early** based on order and shipping characteristics.\"\n",
        ")\n",
        "st.markdown(\"---\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# ── Input fields ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n",
        "st.subheader(\"📦 Order Details\")\n",
        "\n",
        "col1, col2 = st.columns(2)\n",
        "\n",
        "with col1:\n",
        "    shipping_mode = st.selectbox(\n",
        "        \"Shipping Mode\",\n",
        "        [\"Standard Class\", \"Second Class\", \"First Class\", \"Same Day\"]\n",
        "    )\n",
        "    shipping_duration = st.number_input(\n",
        "        \"Dispatch Lag (days from order to shipping)\",\n",
        "        min_value=0, max_value=100, value=7,\n",
        "        help=\"How many days passed between the order date and the shipping date?\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "    market = st.selectbox(\n",
        "        \"Market\",\n",
        "        [\"Europe\", \"LATAM\", \"USCA\", \"Pacific Asia\", \"Africa\"]\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "with col2:\n",
        "    customer_segment = st.selectbox(\n",
        "        \"Customer Segment\",\n",
        "        [\"Consumer\", \"Corporate\", \"Home Office\"]\n",
        "    )\n",
        "    order_item_quantity = st.slider(\n",
        "        \"Order Item Quantity\", min_value=1, max_value=5, value=2\n",
        "    )\n",
        "    profit_per_order = st.number_input(\n",
        "        \"Profit Per Order ($)\",\n",
        "        min_value=-500.0, max_value=500.0, value=25.0\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "st.markdown(\"---\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# ── Risk Assessment Panel ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n",
        "if st.button(\"🔮 Assess Delivery Risk\", use_container_width=True):\n",
        "\n",
        "    st.subheader(\"📊 Delivery Risk Assessment\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Shipping mode risk signal\n",
        "    mode_risk = {\n",
        "        \"Standard Class\": (\"warning\", \"38.1% historical late-delivery rate — the highest of all modes.\"),\n",
        "        \"Second Class\":   (\"success\", \"Only 0.3% late rate. 76.8% of orders arrive Early.\"),\n",
        "        \"First Class\":    (\"success\", \"Near-zero failure rate. 98.5% of orders arrive Early.\"),\n",
        "        \"Same Day\":       (\"info\",    \"4.2% late rate. 42.7% On-Time, 53.1% Early.\")\n",
        "    }\n",
        "    level, msg = mode_risk[shipping_mode]\n",
        "    if level == \"warning\":\n",
        "        st.warning(f\"⚠️ **{shipping_mode}:** {msg}\")\n",
        "    elif level == \"success\":\n",
        "        st.success(f\"✅ **{shipping_mode}:** {msg}\")\n",
        "    else:\n",
        "        st.info(f\"ℹ️ **{shipping_mode}:** {msg}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Dispatch lag signal\n",
        "    if shipping_duration > 7:\n",
        "        st.warning(\n",
        "            f\"⚠️ **Dispatch lag of {shipping_duration} days** exceeds the recommended \"\n",
        "            \"3-day SLA. High dispatch lag is the second strongest predictor of late delivery \"\n",
        "            \"(17.94% feature importance).\"\n",
        "        )\n",
        "    elif shipping_duration <= 3:\n",
        "        st.success(\n",
        "            f\"✅ **Dispatch lag of {shipping_duration} days** is within the recommended SLA. \"\n",
        "            \"Short dispatch lag strongly reduces late-delivery risk.\"\n",
        "        )\n",
        "    else:\n",
        "        st.info(\n",
        "            f\"ℹ️ Dispatch lag of {shipping_duration} days is slightly above the 3-day SLA \"\n",
        "            \"but not critically high.\"\n",
        "        )\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Combined risk summary\n",
        "    st.markdown(\"---\")\n",
        "    if shipping_mode == \"Standard Class\" and shipping_duration > 7:\n",
        "        st.error(\n",
        "            \"🔴 **HIGH LATE-DELIVERY RISK.** This order combines the highest-risk shipping mode \"\n",
        "            \"with an above-SLA dispatch lag — the two top predictors of late delivery. \"\n",
        "            \"Consider upgrading to Second Class or expediting the dispatch.\"\n",
        "        )\n",
        "    elif shipping_mode == \"Standard Class\":\n",
        "        st.warning(\n",
        "            \"🟡 **MODERATE RISK.** Standard Class carries inherent late-delivery risk. \"\n",
        "            \"Monitor dispatch queue closely.\"\n",
        "        )\n",
        "    else:\n",
        "        st.success(\n",
        "            \"🟢 **LOW RISK.** This shipping mode has a strong on-time / early track record.\"\n",
        "        )\n",
        "\n",
        "    st.caption(\n",
        "        \"Model: Tuned GradientBoostingClassifier  ·  \"\n",
        "        \"Weighted F1: 0.5791  ·  5-fold CV F1: 0.5768 ± 0.0091  ·  \"\n",
        "        \"Late Recall: 68.1%  ·  Early Recall: 78.0%\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "st.markdown(\"---\")\n",
        "st.markdown(\n",
        "    \"**Built by:** Adewale Samson Adeagbo &nbsp;|&nbsp; \"\n",
        "    \"[LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/adewalesamsonadeagbo) &nbsp;|&nbsp; \"\n",
        "    \"[GitHub](https://github.com/cssadewale)\"\n",
        ")\n",
        "```\n",
        "\n",
        "> **Note on the app architecture:** The full trained model requires a 309-feature encoded input vector. Building the complete preprocessing pipeline in Streamlit would require replicating all encoding logic. For a clean portfolio demonstration, this app derives risk signals directly from the two top features (`shipping_mode` and `shipping_duration`), which together account for 85% of all model learning. For a full production API, you would wrap the preprocessing and model in a scikit-learn `Pipeline` object and call `.predict()` on raw input.\n",
        "\n",
        "---\n",
        "\n",
        "## 9.5 Pushing to GitHub — Step by Step (Browser Only)\n",
        "\n",
        "Since you work from an Android tablet, use the **GitHub web interface** — no terminal needed:\n",
        "\n",
        "**Step 1 — Create the repository**\n",
        "1. Go to [github.com](https://github.com) → sign in → click the green **New** button\n",
        "2. Repository name: `swiftchain-delivery-prediction`\n",
        "3. Visibility: **Public** (required for Streamlit Cloud free tier)\n",
        "4. Tick **Add a README file**\n",
        "5. Click **Create repository**\n",
        "\n",
        "**Step 2 — Upload the `.pkl` files and notebook**\n",
        "1. In your new repository, click **Add file → Upload files**\n",
        "2. Download from Colab first: Files panel → right-click → Download for:\n",
        "   - `SwiftChain_Delivery_Delay_Prediction.ipynb`\n",
        "   - `swiftchain_delay_predictor.pkl`\n",
        "   - `swiftchain_scaler.pkl`\n",
        "3. Upload all three to your repository\n",
        "4. Commit message: `Add trained model, scaler, and notebook`\n",
        "5. Click **Commit changes**\n",
        "\n",
        "**Step 3 — Create `app.py`**\n",
        "1. In the repository, click **Add file → Create new file**\n",
        "2. File name: `app.py`\n",
        "3. Paste the complete Streamlit code from Section 9.4\n",
        "4. Commit message: `Add Streamlit app`\n",
        "5. Click **Commit new file**\n",
        "\n",
        "**Step 4 — Create `requirements.txt`**\n",
        "1. Click **Add file → Create new file**\n",
        "2. File name: `requirements.txt`\n",
        "3. Paste the requirements from Section 9.2\n",
        "4. Commit message: `Add requirements`\n",
        "5. Click **Commit new file**\n",
        "\n",
        "**Step 5 — Update `README.md`**\n",
        "1. Click on `README.md` in the file list\n",
        "2. Click the **pencil (Edit) icon**\n",
        "3. Replace the default content with the template from Section 9.3\n",
        "4. Commit message: `Update README with project details`\n",
        "5. Click **Commit changes**\n",
        "\n",
        "Your repository is now complete and ready for deployment.\n",
        "\n",
        "---\n",
        "\n",
        "## 9.6 Deploying on Streamlit Cloud — Step by Step\n",
        "\n",
        "**Step 1 — Sign up**\n",
        "Go to [streamlit.io/cloud](https://streamlit.io/cloud) and click **Sign in with GitHub**. Authorise Streamlit to access your repositories.\n",
        "\n",
        "**Step 2 — Deploy the app**\n",
        "1. Click **New app**\n",
        "2. **Repository:** select `your-username/swiftchain-delivery-prediction`\n",
        "3. **Branch:** `main`\n",
        "4. **Main file path:** `app.py`\n",
        "5. Click **Deploy!**\n",
        "\n",
        "**Step 3 — Wait for the build**\n",
        "Streamlit Cloud reads your `requirements.txt` and installs all dependencies. The first build takes 2–4 minutes. Watch the build log for any errors.\n",
        "\n",
        "**Step 4 — Get your public URL**\n",
        "Once deployed, Streamlit gives you a URL like:\n",
        "`https://swiftchain-delivery-prediction.streamlit.app`\n",
        "\n",
        "This is your live portfolio link. Add it everywhere:\n",
        "- Your **LinkedIn profile → Featured section**\n",
        "- Your **GitHub profile → Pinned repositories → About** (edit pencil on the repo)\n",
        "- Your **CV/résumé** as a live project link under the SwiftChain entry\n",
        "\n",
        "---\n",
        "\n",
        "## 9.7 Common Errors and Fixes\n",
        "\n",
        "| Error | Cause | Fix |\n",
        "|-------|-------|-----|\n",
        "| `ModuleNotFoundError: sklearn` | `scikit-learn` missing from `requirements.txt` | Add `scikit-learn==1.5.0` |\n",
        "| `ValueError: sklearn version mismatch` | Training and deployment versions differ | Match the version exactly with your Colab environment |\n",
        "| `FileNotFoundError: swiftchain_delay_predictor.pkl` | File not in repository root | Confirm the `.pkl` file is at the top level, not inside a folder |\n",
        "| Blank white screen | Syntax error in `app.py` | Go to Streamlit Cloud dashboard → **Manage app → Logs** |\n",
        "| `MemoryError` on load | `.pkl` file too large | `@st.cache_resource` is already included — ensure it is not removed |\n",
        "| Build succeeds but app crashes | Import error for a library | Check Logs; add the missing package to `requirements.txt` |\n",
        "\n",
        "---\n",
        "\n",
        "## 9.8 Portfolio Presentation Strategy\n",
        "\n",
        "Once deployed, here is how to maximise the impact of this project:\n",
